name: analyze-options
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit | scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs},deterministic-output | lens: kahneman-tversky | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Bounded scope the decision applies to.

required_inputs.name: DECISION_CRITERIA
required_inputs.description: Criteria and relative weights for scoring.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Files, docs, measurements, or prior notes.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Hard limits that change the trade-off.
